candidates.why: Best direct top-line revenue line; populated and more specific than subtotal rows.
Also a valid revenue total, but it is a subtotal/total and less preferred than the direct revenue line.
Section/header style label with no values shown; less suitable than the populated revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the most specific populated revenue row rather than a subtotal/section header.

candidates.why: Best candidate-list match for total cost of sales / cost of revenues.
Excludes depreciation, so it is not the full reported cost-of-revenues line.
Looks like a partial/legacy component and is missing 2025; less suitable than the total line.

variables.notes: Used the full cost-of-revenues total from the candidate list. Did not use depreciation/amortization component rows or the excluding-depreciation variant.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and already excludes R&D as desired.
Component/detail row but less complete and not needed when an explicit SG&A row exists.
Too broad and includes COGS; not appropriate when explicit SG&A exists.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Per SG&A hierarchy, selected only the explicit SG&A row. Excluded broader totals like Operating Expenses and excluded D&A component rows.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is not R&D expense; it indicates SG&A excluding R&D, so it cannot be used as XRD itself.

variables.notes: No separate R&D expense row is present in the provided statements.

candidates.why: Most direct and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Good fallback if the simpler Interest Expense label is unavailable in some years.
Less preferred because it is net of interest income, but acceptable fallback under the rules.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Only a lease-interest component, not total interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list of reported interest-expense labels; later code should take the first non-missing value by year.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it explicitly excludes minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Good fallback owner-equity label for years where the main parent-equity label may differ.
Also appears to represent parent/common equity excluding minority interest; useful fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Not preferred because it includes minority interest and would risk double counting with MIB.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent/owner equity lines to exclude non-controlling interests from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line.
Equivalent fallback label for minority interest.
Income statement allocation, not the balance-sheet stock of non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet minority-interest labels so BE + MIB can be constructed without double counting.
